pr.title: Track 10min_16mb: PR #287 family rerun at 585s wallclock (mean val_bpb=1.1346)

output.summary: PR #287 rerun pairs XSA-4 bigram heads, EMA+Muon optimizer, and int6 QAT with FlashAttention 3 while capping to 585s to keep artifacts <16MB.
techniques: FlashAttention 3 with XSA_LAST_N=4 and BigramHash embedding
EMA decay and Muon optimizer knobs with QAT-enabled int6 export
585s wallclock cap on 8×H100 SXM to comply with 16MB artifact limit
